# String Repetition Assignment

String repetition assignment operator

```perl
$pattern x= $count;
```

## Expected Compilation Outcomes

### Clean Perl Output

```perl
$pattern x= $count;
```

### Typed Perl Output

```perl
$pattern x= $count;
```
